channel.title: Dellenny
channel.description: Guide me in IT world: Exploring the future of technology

item.title: How to Secure Microsoft AI Agents in Production: An Enterprise-Grade Guide
item.dc:creator: John Edward
item.description:
As organizations rapidly adopt AI-powered agents across their operations, security has moved from a secondary concern to a board-level priority. Microsoft’s AI ecosystem spanning Copilot, Azure AI, and custom agents—offers powerful capabilities, but deploying these systems in production without a robust security strategy introduces serious risks. Enterprise leaders aren’t just asking what AI can do… 

The post How to Secure Microsoft AI Agents in Production: An Enterprise-Grade Guide appeared first on Dellenny.
